payload.label: couch
payload.short_description: dark brown leather loveseat, edge cropped
payload.long_description: Partial view of a dark brown (nearly black) shiny leather loveseat/two-seat couch with vertical tufted back cushions, pronounced seat creases and some surface wear; right side is edge-cropped in the image and an armrest cup holder and a small remote/object sit on the right arm — appears approximately 1.0 meter from the camera.

message.content: {"label":"couch","short_description":"dark brown leather loveseat, edge cropped","long_description":"Partial view of a dark brown (nearly black) shiny leather loveseat/two-seat couch with vertical tufted back cushions, pronounced seat creases and some surface wear; right side is edge-cropped in the image and an armrest cup holder and a small remote/object sit on the right arm — appears approximately 1.0 meter from the camera.","attributes":["dark brown / nearly black","leather (shiny)","loveseat / two-seater","vertical tufted back","pronounced seat creases","visible wear/scuffs","armrest cup holder","remote/object on arm","right edge-cropped"],"distance_from_camera_m":1.0}
